回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 社會科學概論 (Introduction of Social Science)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 洪淑敏	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
This class aims to introduce the study about human society and social relationships. It includes a variety of academic disciplines that examine how individual and groups interact, behave and organize themselves within social context. The interdisciplinary study includes some disciplines like psychology, sociology, economics and political science. 


2.教學綱要
It will include the study in the field of psychology, self and family, self and society. 


3.教科書
4	書名 : Visions of Marriages: Politics and Family on Kinme
n 1920-2020

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
midterm exam 25% Final exam 25% Presentation 30% Participation20% (Percentage might be adjusted mildly according to students' situation.) 
Absence and being late may cause the deduction of your grade. Please don't use cell phone in the class.
